title: Reef Tanks and Rabbit Holes
excerpt: Two reef tanks in the pipeline, a photo gallery on the site, and a bot that reads EXIF metadata. The adventure continues.

title: The Setup Is Actually Cooked
excerpt: Live stats, a custom console, a Discord bot, and now a one-click blog publisher. This got out of hand in the best way.

title: We're Actually Doing This
excerpt: A purple donut with a website. A custom chat bot. A Discord server. A death counter on stream. This got out of hand fast and honestly? Good.
